meta.title: FLUXX PMC — Private Military Corporation
meta.description: Elite private military corporation operating across the Stanton system. Security, tactical operations, escorts, and strategic recon.

hero.title: FLUXX PMC
hero.subtitle: Private Military Corporation operating across the Stanton system.
hero.tagline: We do not seek war. We execute it.

home.overview_text: FLUXX PMC delivers precision military services across all theaters of operation within the Stanton system. From high-value asset protection to full-scale tactical deployments, our operators execute with disciplined efficiency and zero tolerance for failure.

security.title: Security Operations
security.text: Comprehensive protection for high-value assets, personnel, and installations. Our security teams deploy advanced counter-intrusion measures and maintain 24/7 vigilance across all contracted zones.
security.highlight: Perimeter Defense • Threat Response • Asset Protection

tactical.title: Tactical Operations
tactical.text: Precision strike capabilities for hostile environment neutralization. FLUXX assault teams are trained for zero-margin engagements in space, atmosphere, and ground theaters.

escort.title: Escort & Convoy
escort.text: Armed escort services for cargo transports, VIP shuttles, and fleet movements. Multi-ship formations with layered defensive protocols ensure safe passage through contested corridors.
escort.highlight: Fleet Protection • VIP Escort • Route Security

recon.title: Reconnaissance
recon.text: Covert intelligence gathering and surveillance operations. Our recon division maps hostile territory, tracks threat movements, and provides real-time tactical intelligence to command.

assault.title: Assault Division
assault.text: Front-line combat specialists trained for direct engagement. Equipped for ship-to-ship warfare, boarding operations, and planetary assault scenarios.
assault.specialties: Ship Combat, Boarding Ops, Planetary Assault

recon.title: Recon Division
recon.text: Stealth operators specializing in intelligence gathering, target acquisition, and electronic warfare. The eyes and ears of every FLUXX operation.

logistics.title: Logistics Division
logistics.text: Supply chain and operational support specialists. Responsible for fleet maintenance, ammunition resupply, fuel management, and forward base establishment.

medical.title: Medical Support
medical.text: Combat medics and trauma specialists providing battlefield medical support. Equipped with dedicated medical ships for extraction and emergency triage.

home.trust_text: FLUXX PMC has executed hundreds of contracts across the most contested space in the Stanton system. Our operators have been tested under live fire and have delivered results when seconds determine survival.

security.title: Security
security.fullDescription: Comprehensive perimeter defense and static security operations for installations, mining operations, and high-value assets.

combat.title: Combat Ops
combat.fullDescription: Full-scale offensive operations with coordinated multi-ship formations and integrated ground support. Tactical strikes against hostile forces.

escort.title: Escort
escort.fullDescription: Armed escort services protecting cargo transports, VIP shuttles, and fleet movements through contested space. Multi-ship defensive formations.

recon.title: Recon
recon.fullDescription: Covert intelligence gathering, target mapping, and threat assessment in contested or unexplored territories. Electronic warfare and sensor operations.

differentiators.title: Hierarchical Command
differentiators.text: Every operation runs through a command structure that ensures accountability, rapid decision-making, and mission success. No freelance chaos.

differentiators.title: Doctrine-Driven
differentiators.text: We operate under established protocols and rules of engagement. Our operators know the mission. Your objectives are crystal clear.

differentiators.title: Organic Support
differentiators.text: Medical, logistics, and real-time intelligence integrated into every operation. You get the full force, not isolated units.

differentiators.title: 24/7 Operational Readiness
differentiators.text: The galaxy doesn't sleep. We maintain constant alert posture with rapid-response teams ready for immediate deployment at your call.

home.fleet_text: FLUXX PMC maintains a diversified fleet of combat, support, and reconnaissance vessels. Our assets range from heavy assault fighters to dedicated medical frigates — ensuring full-spectrum operational capability across any theater.
home.join_text: FLUXX PMC is actively recruiting experienced pilots, ground operators, and support specialists. If you have the discipline, the skill, and the resolve — there is a place for you in our ranks.

about.hero_text: FLUXX PMC was founded on a singular principle: that precision, discipline, and unwavering commitment to the mission are the only metrics that matter. We are not mercenaries — we are a professional military corporation held to the highest standards of operational excellence.
about.overview_text:
FLUXX Private Military Corporation is an independent defense contractor operating primarily within the Stanton system. We provide full-spectrum military services to corporations, logistics operators, mining outfits, and private entities who require professional armed support.

Our personnel are drawn from experienced combat veterans, former military aviators, and specialized operators who have proven themselves in live-fire environments. Every member of FLUXX has earned their position through merit, performance, and an uncompromising dedication to the mission.

precision.title: Precision Above All
precision.text: Every operation is planned with surgical accuracy. We do not rely on overwhelming force — we rely on calculated, decisive action that achieves objectives with minimal collateral impact.

discipline.title: Discipline Defines Us
discipline.text: FLUXX operators adhere to strict rules of engagement and a chain of command that ensures accountability at every level. Discipline is not optional — it is the foundation of everything we do.

reliability.title: Reliability Under Fire
reliability.text: When the situation deteriorates, FLUXX stands firm. Our clients trust us because we deliver results regardless of how hostile the environment becomes.

discretion.title: Operational Discretion
discretion.text: Client confidentiality and operational security are paramount. FLUXX maintains strict information compartmentalization and never discloses operational details beyond need-to-know channels.

about.doctrine_text: FLUXX operates under a unified command doctrine that emphasizes speed, coordination, and overwhelming tactical advantage at the point of engagement. Our operations are built on three pillars:

intel.title: Intelligence First
intel.text: No operation begins without comprehensive reconnaissance. Our Intel division maps the operational environment, identifies threats and opportunities, and provides commanders with actionable data before any engagement order is issued.

coordination.title: Multi-Domain Coordination
coordination.text: FLUXX deploys across space, atmosphere, and ground simultaneously. Our command structure supports seamless coordination between ship-based assets, ground teams, and support elements — ensuring no domain is left unsecured.

extraction.title: Decisive Execution
extraction.text: When the order is given, FLUXX operators execute with speed and violence of action that denies the enemy any opportunity to adapt. We strike fast, achieve the objective, and extract — leaving nothing to chance.

track_record.title: Proven Track Record
track_record.text: Hundreds of successful operations across every environment in the Stanton system. Our completion rate speaks for itself.

professionalism.title: Military Professionalism
professionalism.text: We conduct ourselves as a professional military force — not a loosely organized group of freelancers. Clients receive structured briefings, clear communication, and accountable leadership.

scalability.title: Scalable Force Projection
scalability.text: Whether you need a two-ship escort or a full fleet deployment, FLUXX scales to meet the threat level. Our modular force structure allows rapid task organization for any mission profile.

confidentiality.title: Absolute Confidentiality
confidentiality.text: Every contract is handled with the utmost discretion. FLUXX never discusses client operations, routes, or asset details with any external party. Period.

about.history_text:
FLUXX PMC was established in the Stanton system by a cadre of experienced combat operators who recognized the growing demand for professional military services in an increasingly volatile frontier. What began as a small tactical unit providing escort services has evolved into a full-spectrum private military corporation capable of executing complex multi-domain operations.

Through disciplined growth, strategic recruitment, and an unwavering commitment to operational excellence, FLUXX has expanded from a single squadron to a multi-division organization with assets deployed across the system. Our reputation was not built through marketing — it was earned in the field, one successful operation at a time.

operations.hero_text: Execution of tactical missions across the Stanton system.

security.title: Security Operations
security.short_desc: Static and mobile security for installations. Perimeter defense and 24/7 threat response.
security.text: Static and mobile security for installations, mining operations, and corporate facilities. Our security teams establish layered defense perimeters, conduct regular threat assessments, and maintain rapid response capabilities for any incursion scenario.
security.detail: Includes: perimeter defense, counter-intrusion, threat monitoring, VIP protection, installation security.

combat.title: Combat Deployments
combat.short_desc: Full-scale offensive operations with coordinated multi-ship assault formations.
combat.text: Full-scale offensive operations against hostile forces. FLUXX combat teams deploy in coordinated multi-ship formations with ground support elements, executing assault, interdiction, and area denial missions with lethal efficiency.
combat.detail: Includes: assault operations, area denial, interdiction, hostile force neutralization, defensive operations.

recon.title: Recon Missions
recon.short_desc: Covert intelligence gathering and threat mapping in contested space.
recon.text: Covert intelligence gathering and surveillance in contested or unknown space. Our recon operators utilize low-signature vessels and advanced sensor arrays to map enemy positions, track movements, and identify vulnerabilities before the main force commits.
recon.detail: Includes: surveillance, target acquisition, electronic warfare, route reconnaissance, threat mapping.

escort.title: Escort Operations
escort.short_desc: Armed convoy protection through contested corridors with layered defensive coverage.
escort.text: Armed convoy protection for cargo transports, passenger vessels, and fleet movements through contested corridors. FLUXX escort formations maintain 360-degree threat coverage and execute immediate counter-attack protocols upon hostile contact.
escort.detail: Includes: convoy escort, VIP transport, route security, cargo protection, fleet screening.

precision.title: Precision
precision.text: Every operation calculated to minimize collateral. No excess force.

discipline.title: Discipline
discipline.text: Established protocols. Clear hierarchies. Accountability at every level.

speed.title: Speed
speed.text: Rapid response & execution. Seconds determine survival in contested space.

mission.title: Mission Priority
mission.text: Objectives achieved. Personnel returned. Contracts fulfilled completely.

step1.title: Contract Intake
step1.text: Client submits a contract request detailing the operational requirement, threat assessment, and desired outcome. FLUXX command reviews and assigns a mission coordinator.

step2.title: Intelligence & Planning
step2.text: Our Intel division conducts preliminary reconnaissance, assesses the operational environment, and develops a comprehensive mission plan including force composition, rules of engagement, and contingency protocols.

step3.title: Force Assembly
step3.text: Based on the mission plan, FLUXX assembles the appropriate task force — selecting operators, ships, and support assets matched to the specific threat profile and operational requirements.

step4.title: Mission Briefing
step4.text: All operators receive a detailed mission briefing covering objectives, timelines, contingencies, and communication protocols. Every team member understands their role and the overall intent.

step5.title: Execution
step5.text: The operation is launched under centralized command. Real-time adjustments are made as conditions evolve, with command maintaining situational awareness throughout the engagement.

step6.title: Debrief & Report
step6.text: Post-mission, FLUXX conducts a thorough debrief and provides the client with an after-action report detailing mission outcomes, force performance, and any intelligence gathered during the operation.

operations.structure_text: FLUXX operates under a hierarchical command structure designed for clear accountability and rapid decision-making in combat environments.

command.title: Strategic Command
command.text: Senior leadership responsible for corporate strategy, major contract negotiations, and overall force posture. Sets operational priorities and allocates resources.

operations.title: Operations Command
operations.text: Manages day-to-day operational planning and mission coordination. Translates strategic directives into actionable mission orders and oversees force deployment.

division.title: Division Leads
division.text: Each operational division (Assault, Recon, Logistics, Medical) is led by an experienced commander responsible for unit readiness, training standards, and mission execution.

squad.title: Squadron Leaders
squad.text: Tactical-level commanders who lead teams in the field. Squadron leaders have authority to make real-time decisions within the commander's intent and rules of engagement.

contracts.hero_text: FLUXX PMC provides professional military services on a contract basis. Whether you need a single escort or a full combat deployment, our command staff will develop a solution tailored to your operational requirements.
contracts.why_text: When you contract FLUXX PMC, you are not hiring freelancers — you are engaging a professional military organization with established doctrine, trained operators, and a proven track record. Every contract receives dedicated command oversight, structured communication, and accountability at every level.

security.title: Security Contracts
security.text: Ongoing protection for installations, mining operations, and corporate facilities. Includes threat assessment, perimeter establishment, and rapid response teams.
security.scope: Scope: 24/7 site surveillance, counter-intrusion, threat monitoring, incident response

escort.title: Escort Missions
escort.text: Armed escort for cargo transports, passenger vessels, and fleet movements through contested space. Multi-ship formations with layered defense protocols.
escort.scope: Scope: Route security, multi-ship formations, threat interdiction, emergency extraction
escort.team_size: Team Size: Single ship to full squadron

combat.title: Combat Operations
combat.text: Offensive military operations against hostile forces. Full mission planning, force assembly, and execution under FLUXX command.
combat.scope: Scope: Assault operations, hostile neutralization, area denial, defensive operations
combat.team_size: Team Size: Custom — single operator to full division
combat.rules_of_engagement: Defined per-mission based on threat level and operational context

recon.title: Strategic Recon
recon.text: Covert intelligence gathering, route surveying, and threat mapping. Ideal for pre-operation intelligence or ongoing surveillance requirements.
recon.scope: Scope: Surveillance ops, threat mapping, target acquisition, intel reports
recon.duration: Duration: One-time survey or ongoing monitoring
recon.sla: SLA: Daily intel briefs, full stealth operational security

process.title: Initial Consultation
process.text: Submit your contract request with preliminary operational requirements. FLUXX command reviews and schedules a detailed consultation.

process.title: Requirements Analysis
process.text: Our operations team analyzes threat level, duration, asset requirements, and operational environment to develop an accurate assessment.

process.title: Mission Planning
process.text: FLUXX develops a comprehensive mission plan including force composition, rules of engagement, risk assessment, and contingency protocols.

process.title: Contract Negotiation
process.text: Command presents the plan with accurate pricing, timelines, and terms. All conditions are negotiated and formalized in the contract document.

process.title: Force Assembly
process.text: Upon contract signature, FLUXX assembles the dedicated task force and conducts final operational briefings before deployment.

process.title: Execution & Support
process.text: Mission execution with real-time command oversight, daily status reports, and adjustments as operational conditions evolve.

terms.title: Operational Security
terms.text: All operational details, client information, and mission parameters remain strictly confidential. FLUXX maintains secure communications channels for all contracts.

terms.title: Dedicated Command
terms.text: Every contract receives a dedicated command staff member as primary liaison. Direct communication access to mission commanders at all times.

terms.title: Performance Guarantee
terms.text: FLUXX guarantees mission objectives will be met as defined in contract specifications. Failure to meet objectives results in service credit or refund.

terms.title: 24/7 Support
terms.text: Full operational support during contract execution. Command center monitoring, emergency protocols, and tactical adjustments on demand.

contracts.form_success: Contract request submitted successfully. FLUXX Operations Command will review your request and contact you within 48 hours with preliminary assessment and scheduling options.
contracts.form_disclaimer: All contract requests are reviewed by FLUXX Operations Command. Submission does not guarantee acceptance. FLUXX reserves the right to decline any contract that conflicts with our operational doctrine, values, or existing contracts. All information submitted is treated as confidential and proprietary.

pricing.details: Depends on threat level, location, and duration
Multi-ship discounts available for extended contracts
Based on mission complexity, duration, and asset deployment
Intelligence reports and ongoing monitoring available

recruitment.hero_text: Elite operators only. High-risk missions. Zero margin for error.

pilots_logistics.title: Pilots & Logistics
pilots_logistics.description: The spine of FLUXX operations. Our pilots command the skies while logistics keeps the machine running. Both roles are essential and often overlap in small teams.

pilots.title: Combat Pilots
pilots.text: Experienced aviators capable of operating in high-threat environments. Must demonstrate proficiency in ship-to-ship combat, formation flying, and multi-role operations.

logistics.title: Logistics Coordinator
logistics.text: Operations support specialists who manage supply chains, vehicle maintenance, and mission coordination. Must be comfortable with multi-tasking and problem-solving under pressure.

qualifications: Combat flight experience or logistics background

assault.title: Assault Division
assault.description: Direct action specialists trained for boarding operations, planetary assault, and hostile environment neutralization. Our heavy hitters who execute the hardest missions.
qualifications: FPS combat proficiency and tactical awareness
Boarding operation experience or willingness to train
Ability to follow rules of engagement precisely
Physical and mental resilience in hostile environments

recon.title: Recon Division
recon.description: Intelligence operatives who gather data, conduct surveillance, and map the operational environment. The eyes and ears of FLUXX command.
qualifications: Ability to work solo or in tight teams

requirements_list.r1: Active Star Citizen account in good standing
requirements_list.r2: Disciplined approach to organized military operations
requirements_list.r3: Strict adherence to chain of command
requirements_list.r6: Zero tolerance for internal conflict or insubordination

recruitment.apply_text: Submit your application through our official channels. All applicants undergo background evaluation and tactical assessment.
recruitment.apply_step3: Submit your application with your RSI handle
recruitment.apply_step4: Complete a brief interview with a recruiter

contact.hero_text: For contract inquiries, recruitment questions, or general communication — reach out through our Discord server or Star Citizen organization page. FLUXX command monitors all incoming communications.

inquiries.title: Contract Request
inquiries.description: Interested in hiring FLUXX for security, escort, combat, or reconnaissance operations? Start your contract inquiry through Discord.

inquiries.title: Recruitment
inquiries.description: Want to join FLUXX PMC? Learn about our divisions, roles, and the application process. Discord is your first stop.

inquiries.title: General Inquiry
inquiries.description: Questions about FLUXX operations, organization, or capabilities? Our community on Discord or the RSI organization page can help.

inquiries.title: Partnership Opportunities
inquiries.description: Interested in coordinating operations or strategic partnerships? Discord command staff can discuss opportunities.

discord.title: Discord Server
discord.text: Primary communication hub for FLUXX PMC. Join for real-time updates, contract inquiries, recruitment applications, and direct contact with command staff. All request types welcome here.

org.title: RSI Organization
org.text: Official Star Citizen organization page. View our roster, fleet composition, organizational structure, and member profiles. Great for understanding our organization before engaging.

footer.description: Private Military Corporation operating across the Stanton system. Professional military services for corporations, logistics operators, and private entities.
footer.disclaimer: FLUXX PMC is a fictional organization within Star Citizen. Not affiliated with Cloud Imperium Games.
